def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
sign_up_sheet_maker.publish_sheet() shareable_link = sign_up_sheet_maker.copy_shareable_link()
> login_modal.sign_out()

def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.JavascriptException: Message: javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click') E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00B50283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x00ADB234] E (No symbol) [0x009B04A3] E (No symbol) [0x009B6EA1] E (No symbol) [0x009B9203] E (No symbol) [0x00A3F6C5] E (No symbol) [0x00A1CF3C] E (No symbol) [0x00A3E6E1] E (No symbol) [0x00A1CD36] E (No symbol) [0x009EBD29] E (No symbol) [0x009ED064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00E5B143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00E722BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00E6C4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00BE9C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x00AE45BD] E (No symbol) [0x00AE14A8] E (No symbol) [0x00AE1647] E (No symbol) [0x00AD3D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75A15D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7734CEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7734CE41+561]
e = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorCode object at 0x7f347a707260> error_code = 'JAVASCRIPT_ERROR' error_codes = ['DETACHED_SHADOW_ROOT', 'ELEMENT_CLICK_INTERCEPTED', 'ELEMENT_IS_NOT_SELECTABLE', 'ELEMENT_NOT_INTERACTABLE', 'ELEMENT_NOT_VISIBLE', 'IME_ENGINE_ACTIVATION_FAILED', ...] error_info = [17, 'javascript error'] exception_class = <class 'selenium.common.exceptions.JavascriptException'> message = "javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click')\n (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126)" response = {'status': 500, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"javascript error","message":"javascript error: Cannot read properties of ...9+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7734CEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7734CE41+561]\\n"}}'} screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7f347c2bf980> st_value = '\tGetHandleVerifier [0x00B50283+25139]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00ADB234]\n\t(No symbol) [0x009B04A3]\n\t(No symbol) [0x009B...0x75A15D49+25]\n\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7734CEBB+107]\n\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7734CE41+561]\n' stacktrace = ['\tGetHandleVerifier [0x00B50283+25139]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00ADB234]', '\t(No symbol) [0x009B04A3]', '\t(No symbol) [0x009B6EA1]', '\t(No symbol) [0x009B9203]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00A3F6C5]', ...] status = 'javascript error' value = {'error': 'javascript error', 'message': "javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click')\n (Sessi...x75A15D49+25]\n\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7734CEBB+107]\n\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7734CE41+561]\n'} value_json = '{"value":{"error":"javascript error","message":"javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading \'click\')\...49+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7734CEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7734CE41+561]\\n"}}'

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_free

failure.message: Exception: Can't verify page url contains create, current url: https://test51.evitelabs.com/invites/?active_filter=free_premium%2Cfree

self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f114ab46660> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f114ab61d60>
def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates
Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone.
Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard
:param config: :return: """
_test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3])
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) > evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

def log_and_raise_exception(self, message): """ Uses logger to log exception and then raises Exception error :param message: Message to log and raise :return: """ self.logger.exception(message) > raise Exception(message) E Exception: Can't verify page url contains create, current url: https://test51.evitelabs.com/invites/?active_filter=free_premium%2Cfree

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_premium

failure.message: Exception: Can't click on footer, exiting

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fb7a1820470> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fb7a185db20>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(premium=True)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = (f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview")
step1_template.select_next(url="guests") step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"]) step1_template.select_next(url="review")
step6_review_send.enter_checkout_page(test_data=self._json_test_data, url="confirm")
event_id = Utils.get_event_id_from_url(config.driver.current_url)
get_event_data = quake_v3_event.get_event_information( user_email_addr=user_email_addr, user_pass=user_pass, event_id=event_id )
login_modal.sign_out()
guest_list = step5_guests.initialize_guest_list( test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"], get_event_data=get_event_data["guests"])
# RSVP for each guest for guest in guest_list:
if (guest["guest_type"] == "host" or guest["test_data"]["rsvp"] == "undecided" or not guest["test_data"]["rsvp"]): continue
logger.info("Going guest view URL") page.get_url(environment=config.environment, sub_page_url=f"event/{get_event_data['event']['id']}?gid={guest['guest_id']}", add_cookie=False)
# Check if guest have to be registered if guest["test_data"]["registered"]: # Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = guest["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = guest["email"] # Register login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data['register'], existing_user=True)
# RSVP > rsvp_modal.rsvp(action=guest["test_data"]["rsvp"], guest=guest)
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fb7a185db20> event_details = self = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fb7a185dbe0> message = "Can't click on footer, exiting"
def log_and_raise_exception(self, message): """ Uses logger to log exception and then raises Exception error :param message: Message to log and raise :return: """ self.logger.exception(message) > raise Exception(message) E Exception: Can't click on footer, exiting
message = "Can't click on footer, exiting" self = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fb7a185dbe0>
